name: ClawSight
description: WSInsight + sptxinsight pathology & spatial-transcriptomics AI via Docker MCP servers — tissue segmentation, GPU inference, spatial analytics, cell typing, CME niche discovery, and export

mcpUrl.description: WSInsight MCP endpoint URL. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp

timeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Default: 300000 (5 minutes).

containerName.description: Default WSInsight Docker container name. Default: clawsight-mcp.

sptxMcpUrl.description: sptxinsight MCP endpoint URL. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8766/mcp

sptxTimeoutMs.description: sptxinsight request timeout in milliseconds. Default: 300000 (5 minutes).

sptxContainerName.description: Default sptxinsight Docker container name. Default: clawsight-sptx-mcp.
